semantic_description: Verifies prefix_sum, which scans arrays a and out with a single for loop from i = 0 to i < n, keeps an integer accumulator acc equal to sum(sublist(0, i, la)) at loop head, preserves the input array a, and writes out[i] to the inclusive prefix sum sum(sublist(0, i + 1, la)). The contract permits n = 0, so the loop may execute zero times and out remains an array of length 0 in the postcondition. The function mutates only the caller-provided out array and relies on the precondition that every prefix sum from length 0 through n is within signed int range.
